response: Can you make this email nicer: Hello Professor [Name], I hope you are doing well. I wanted to ask if the meetings on Tuesday night are recorded and posted on Blackboard? The reason for my question is that I cannot attend these meetings due to a significant time difference between your location and mine ([Location] GMT+[Offset]). Therefore, Tuesday meetings for me are from [Start Time] to [End Time], which is not convenient for me. If the meetings are recorded, that would be great.
